decision_note: Official TREP preliminary JSON identifies Antigua Guatemala tc4 scope and contains ballot-accounting-like fields, but it is preliminary, has only 99 counted actas, and its valid/party vote totals conflict with the final EV-0112 confirmed visible rows.
